containmentAssumptions: V578 artifacts are documentary validation artifacts only.
No runtime containment code is executed or modified.
Ambiguous, unknown, or out-of-county assets fail closed by expectation.
ownershipAssumptions: Montgomery package ownership applies only to assets explicitly assigned to Montgomery County/GEOID 48339.
Liberty-owned assets remain outside Montgomery ownership.
Package and registry ownership references are non-production evidence until separately approved.
countyIsolationExpectations: No artifacts are placed into data/.
Liberty boundary data and runtime county data remain untouched.
validationRationale: The fixture suite covers ownership, boundary ambiguity, unknown county, out-of-county, read, write, and awareness containment expectations. The validation artifact records expected references and explicitly notes absent V577 registry/manifest inputs as observations rather than creating production records or runtime behavior.
finalDetermination: CONTAINMENT VALIDATION PACKAGE COMPLETE WITH OBSERVATIONS
